seoTitle: Salisbury vs Salisbury Downs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Salisbury and Salisbury Downs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Salisbury vs Salisbury Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Salisbury and Salisbury Downs.
heading: Salisbury vs Salisbury Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Salisbury, South Australia and Salisbury Downs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Salisbury has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Salisbury Downs (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Salisbury or Salisbury Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Salisbury has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Salisbury Downs scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Salisbury scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Salisbury Downs scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Salisbury or Salisbury Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Salisbury has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
